allow: Bash(node -e "const zlib=require\('zlib'\),fs=require\('fs'\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\('webfetch-1776700940981-9z80dg.bin'\); zlib.gunzip\(buf,\(err,out\)=>{ if\(err\){console.log\('not gzip:',err.message\); const txt=buf.toString\('utf8',0,2000\); console.log\(txt\);} else { fs.writeFileSync\('design.html',out\); console.log\('extracted, size:',out.length\); console.log\(out.toString\('utf8',0,500\)\);}}\)")
